caption: FIGURE 5.1 Mr. Bologna Jun-r as Kalim Azack in Aladdin, or The Wonderful Lamp.
description: A hand-colored etching of a man in an elaborate theatrical costume holding a staff.

caption: FIGURE 5.2 Mr. Grimaldi as Kazrac (the Chinese slave) in Aladdin, or The Wonderful Lamp.
description: A hand-colored etching of a man in a colorful theatrical costume with a pigtail, brandishing two curved swords.
